# Tutorial Fixture Paper

A minimal single-section outline used by the Phase-9 tutorial RED suites. The
locked OUTLINE.md GFM-table header (workflows/outline.md) is reproduced verbatim
so the wave/section readers parse it without special-casing the fixture.
